summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VidTrack published date fix and social accounts features. Both features are working correctly with full end-to-end functionality.
passed_tests: Backend POST /api/videos requires published_date field (422 when missing)
Backend filters invalid social accounts (missing name/url)
Add Video dialog pre-fills date with today's date
Add Video dialog shows platform detection (TikTok/Instagram)
Video cards display published dates (not 'Sin fecha' for new videos)
Video cards show correct tracking countdown based on published date
Video cards show proper payment status (tracking/pending/paid)
My Accounts page loads with proper empty state message
Creator can add TikTok account with platform select, name, URL
Creator can add Instagram account and save
Account preview badges show with correct platform colors
Account preview badges have working external links
Creator can remove accounts and save changes
Social accounts persist after page reload
Admin creator detail page shows social account badges with links
Login/authentication works for both creator and admin users
Navigation between dashboard sections works correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100%, Frontend: 95% (2 legacy videos show 'No date set')
